home.daily_notification_sub: Let's set a quiet time of peace for you.

history.title: My Dhikr History
history.no_history: You don't have any dhikr history yet.
history.clear_confirm_body: All your dhikr history will be deleted. This action cannot be undone. Do you confirm?

settings.title: Add New Dhikr
settings.hint: Add a new dhikr to set your goal and manage app settings.
settings.daily_reminder_sub: Sends a notification to remind you of the day's dhikr.

12.text: Subhanallahi wal-hamdülillahi wa la ilaha illallahu vallahu akbar
12.translation: Glory be to Allah, praise be to Him, there is no god but Allah, and Allah is the greatest.

15.text: La ilaha illallahu wahdahu la sharika lah, lahul-mulku wa lahul-hamdu wa huwa ala kulli shay'in qadir
15.translation: There is no god but Allah, alone, without partner. His is the kingdom, and His is the praise.

6.text: Subhanallahi wa bihamdihi adada khalqihi wa rida nafsihi wa zinata arshihi wa midada kalimatih
6.translation: Glory as well as praise be to Allah, equal to the number of His creatures, His pleasure, the weight of His Throne, and the ink of His words.

notifications.daily_body: Hearts find rest only in the remembrance of Allah. How about a short dhikr break? 🌙
